description_long: This filing cabinet features a tall, rectangular form with a warm, medium-brown wood finish and a vertically oriented central panel that is slightly recessed, bordered by subtle horizontal grooves. The front face is unadorned, lacking visible handles, label holders, or locks, giving it a minimalist and modern appearance. The side views reveal a very slim profile, suggesting the cabinet is relatively narrow in depth. The wood grain is visible and runs vertically along the main panel, with lighter and darker tones adding visual interest. The overall construction appears solid, likely made from engineered wood or veneer over a core material. This cabinet would fit seamlessly into a professional or contemporary office environment.
description: A tall, slim filing cabinet with a minimalist wood finish and a recessed central panel, lacking visible handles or label holders.
description_view_0: Front view showing the recessed central panel and horizontal grooves, with a clean, handle-free surface.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the cabinet's very slim profile and straight edges.
description_view_2: Rear or alternate front view, similar to the front but with slightly different wood grain pattern.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow depth and straight vertical edges.
